_meta.purpose: Ground-truth labels for retrodiction backtesting of the DDTI scorer.
_meta.method: Each event reconstructs the PUBLIC deletion record (the same stream a live deployment ingests from CDT / WeiboScope / GreatFire). The unmodified processors.ddti_index scorer is run over it; we check whether the event's signature terms rank as top threats (selectivity) and whether terms born in the event are flagged is_new (novelty). See docs/VALIDATION.md.
_meta.honest_scope: This validates the SCORING method against labelled events, not end-to-end live collection. Velocity (deletion speed) still needs in-country measurement.
_meta.sources: China Digital Times (deletion + directive archive); WeiboScope (Fu et al., HKU); GreatFire/FreeWeibo; Citizen Lab WeChat keyword testing; contemporaneous reporting (AP, Reuters, BBC).

events.name: Death of whistleblower doctor Li Wenliang
events.expected: Mass mourning scrubbed overnight; selectivity spike on 李文亮; the hashtag #我要言论自由 (I want freedom of speech) surfaces and is deleted within hours — a textbook novelty event.

events.name: Peng Shuai #MeToo allegation against Zhang Gaoli
events.expected: Post scrubbed in ~20-30 minutes; near-total blackout of 彭帅 and 张高丽 — a velocity+selectivity event the index should rank #1 from a handful of deletions.

events.name: Xuzhou / Feng County chained woman
events.expected: A coded label (铁链女) is born to evade deletion of the place name; novelty should flag the coinage while selectivity tracks 丰县.

events.name: Sitong Bridge lone-banner protest
events.expected: Even oblique references (勇士 'warrior', 北京 'Beijing', 桥 'bridge') were filtered on WeChat within hours. Three terms born simultaneously => a sharp novelty cluster.

events.name: Urumqi fire and the White Paper protests
events.expected: A nationwide wave; the blank sheet (白纸) becomes the symbol and spawns 白纸革命 / A4 — novelty should catch the new coinages while selectivity tracks 乌鲁木齐.

events.name: Suspension of youth-unemployment statistics
events.expected: A WITHHOLDING, not a deletion: the series stops being published. Included to mark the boundary of the deletion-as-data method — the index sees rising attention on 青年失业率 but the disappearance is of data, not posts.
